## Intent

- User/system outcome:
- Current behavior:
- Target behavior:
- Non-goals:

## Context Map

- Domain concepts:
- Relevant files/modules:
- Docs/ADRs/specs:
- External systems/data:

## Harness / Backpressure

- Tests:
- Lint/type/build:
- Architecture guardrails:
- Runtime/API/device smoke:
- Android dogfood, if relevant:
- Logs/artifacts:

## Risk Seams

- Auth/security:
- Persistence/migrations:
- Async/playback/session state:
- Public API/contracts:
- UI/device behavior:
- Deploy/rollback:

## Acceptance

- [ ] Observable behavior is proven.
- [ ] Regression coverage landed at the bug/contract boundary.
- [ ] Docs or ADRs updated when architecture changed.
- [ ] Exact-head QA/review/release evidence is recorded.
